data.title: Jinhua Capital Corporation Announces Share Consolidation Effective Date
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest announcement is out from Jinhua Capital Corporation ( (TSE:JHC) ).

Jinhua Capital Corporation has announced a consolidation of its common shares on a ten-to-one basis, effective February 10, 2025, which will result in approximately 6,103,919 issued and outstanding shares. The share consolidation is expected to proportionally adjust the exercise or conversion prices of any outstanding convertible securities, impacting shareholders with physical certificates who will need to exchange them for new post-consolidation certificates.

More about Jinhua Capital Corporation

Jinhua Capital Corporation is a mineral exploration company focused on the Pluto Gold and Base Metals Property in Quebec, with potential interests in acquiring other mineral exploration assets.

Average Trading Volume: 49,504

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$304.5K

data.title: UBS Reports Strong Q4 2024 Results and Successful Credit Suisse Integration
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest announcement is out from ETRACS Alerian MLP Index ETN Class B ( (AMUB) ).

UBS Group AG reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024, showcasing a significant improvement in profitability and market positioning. The company achieved a full-year net profit of 5.1 billion, reflecting an 8.7% return on CET1 capital, supported by strategic investments in its global asset-gathering platform and investment banking operations. UBS successfully navigated the integration of Credit Suisse, reducing execution risks and achieving major legal entity mergers and client account migrations in key regions. The company’s robust capital position, with a CET1 capital ratio of 14.3%, enables it to propose a 29% higher dividend for 2024, while continuing to invest in technology and capabilities to drive sustainable growth. UBS’s Global Wealth Management division saw a notable increase in pre-tax profit and net new assets, highlighting its ability to retain assets and increase profitability despite market challenges.

More about ETRACS Alerian MLP Index ETN Class B

YTD Price Performance: 9.92%

Average Trading Volume: 972

data.title: General Cannabis Expands and Restructures Leadership
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

General Cannabis ( (CANN) ) has shared an announcement.

On January 31, 2025, General Cannabis, through Trees Colorado LLC, agreed to acquire Chronic Therapy, a dispensary in Wheat Ridge, Colorado, for $1,750,000. The acquisition includes a new lease agreement contingent on regulatory approval, highlighting a strategic expansion in the cannabis market. Additionally, on February 1, 2025, Mikayla Gilbert was promoted to Chief Financial Officer, replacing Edward Myers, marking a significant leadership change within the company.

More about General Cannabis

General Cannabis operates in the cannabis industry, providing services through its subsidiary Trees Colorado LLC, which focuses on acquiring licensed dispensaries.

data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Funding Circle Holdings Limited ( (GB:FCH) ) has provided an update.

Funding Circle Holdings Limited has completed a buy-back of 140,633 ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange, as announced in October 2024. This transaction, part of the company’s ongoing share buyback program, will result in the cancellation of these shares, adjusting the company’s issued share capital to 323,516,512 ordinary shares with voting rights. This move is likely aimed at optimizing the capital structure and potentially enhancing shareholder value.

More about Funding Circle Holdings Limited

Funding Circle Holdings Limited operates in the financial services industry, providing peer-to-peer lending services primarily focused on small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs).

NetraMark Holdings Inc. has made significant corporate advancements, including appointing Dr. Angelico Carta as Chief Strategy Officer, who will enhance the company’s pharmaceutical strategy. data.description:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Precia SA ( (FR:ALPM) ) has shared an announcement.

Precia Molen has announced its financial communication schedule for 2025, outlining key dates for the release of their financial results and reports. This announcement provides stakeholders with a clear timeline for the company’s financial disclosures, which could impact investor confidence and market perceptions as Precia Molen continues to operate in the global weighing solutions industry.

More about Precia SA

Precia Molen is a company specializing in the design, manufacture, sale, installation, maintenance, and verification of industrial and commercial weighing instruments. Their solutions cater to both heavy industries such as mining and steel, as well as light industries like food and chemicals. Established in 1951 and headquartered in Privas, France, the company operates on five continents with nine production sites and over 1350 employees. Precia Molen is listed on the Euronext Growth Paris market.

data.title: Kashin Acquires McConnell Technology via Share Exchange
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.

An announcement from Kashin ( (KUSA) ) is now available.

On January 30, 2025, Kashin, Inc. entered into a share exchange agreement with McConnell Technology LLP., an Alberta-based limited liability partnership. As per the agreement, Kashin, Inc. will acquire 100% of the outstanding membership interests in MT LLP, making MT LLP a wholly owned subsidiary by transferring 85,000,000 common shares of Kashin, Inc. to MT LLP’s members.
